summary: Tested photo-upload removal, EnvelopePreview text positioning, product-page slide toggle, and full checkout regression for Printalaram card-1. All 17 backend pytest cases pass (added photoUploadEnabled assertion). Frontend: customize page has no photo upload UI, live preview correctly places Name/Family text between pillars above deity with no overlap. Product page 'Original'/'With Your Name (Preview)' toggle works and composites sample text correctly. Full flow (customize -> checkout -> COD order -> redirect to homepage -> WhatsApp toast) verified working. Mobile (390px) views confirmed no overflow/overlap.
critical_code_review_comments: EnvelopePreview.js and customize/products pages are clean and well within file size limits, good reuse of shared component.

photoUploadEnabled flag correctly gates both UI and payload in customize page (couplePhoto forced to '' when disabled) - verified in backend GET /api/customizations that couplePhoto is stored as empty string.
No console errors observed during any of the tested flows besides benign Next.js dev warnings (fast refresh, preload, web-share feature).
test_credentials: None required - no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: Created test customizations (Priya Patel/Patel, Ramesh Sharma/Sharma) and one COD test order via UI flow during testing - not cleaned up (harmless test data, prefixed with realistic names not TEST_ prefix since flow required realistic input, but these are isolated dev-DB entries).
context_for_next_testing_agent: This iteration confirms: (1) GET /api/products/card-1 returns photoUploadEnabled: false, (2) customize page has zero photo-upload UI elements, (3) live preview text positioning matches spec (name at top:49%, family at top:58%, no deity overlap) verified visually on desktop and mobile, (4) product page slide toggle (data-testid=product-slide-preview-button / product-slide-sample-button) works correctly showing plain vs sample-text-composited envelope, (5) full checkout regression (fill customize -> checkout -> COD -> redirect home -> WhatsApp toast) passes, (6) POST /api/customizations with couplePhoto='' persists and returns correctly. No bugs found this pass.
